Before making UI/UX tooling recommendations for this app, read `docs/AI_UI_UX_RESOURCE_EVALUATION_PLAYBOOK.md` and follow its process.

Evaluate the external UI/UX resources I provide for this specific app. Inspect the app first, identify its real needs, and then decide whether each resource should be `Adopted`, `Adapted`, `Referenced`, or `Skipped`.

Do not assume the style, platform, or implementation stack should match any other app. Do not inherit conclusions from other projects. Recommend the smallest useful non-overlapping system for this app.
